# opnsense_quagga_ospf_network (Data Source)

Configure OSPF networks.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `area` (String) The OSPF area in IPv4 dotted notation.
- `area_range` (String) Area range for summarization.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this OSPF network.
- `ip_addr` (String) The network IP address.
- `net_mask` (String) The network mask.
- `prefix_list_in` (String) UUID of the prefix list for inbound direction.
- `prefix_list_out` (String) UUID of the prefix list for outbound direction.
